name: The world, in your hands to shape.
description:
Land dwellers! May it be human, dogs, cats or whatever you are! This is the bot you've been yearning for!

This is an RPG bot where you may identify how you please, be a dragon, a king, an octopus's tentacles?? Whatever you please! Do whatever you want, go to, wherever, whenever you want!

Ps from the creator: (I'm somewhat new to this site, I think, but it's my first bot so please, comment on what you think I did wrong or the bot's flaws, so I could improve this current bot, and my Future ones)

Ctto, Image/jpeg is not mine I got it from the site freepik.
creator: Zippieee
